user.title: Bandabou Rain
user.description: Configure rain monitoring for Bandabou, Curacao.

data.name: Name
data.notify_on_dry_streak: Send notification when dry streak is reached
data.dry_notify_cooldown_minutes: Dry streak notification cooldown in minutes

data_description.rain_threshold_mm: Current precipitation at or above this value counts as raining.
data_description.dry_day_threshold_mm: A completed day below this total precipitation value counts as dry.
data_description.notify_services: Choose one or more notify services, such as mobile app phone services.
data_description.dry_streak_threshold_days: Send a dry-streak notification once this many completed days have been dry.
